scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,admin,supabase -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:supabase"
scripts.build: npm -w @astprep/web run build && npm -w @astprep/admin run build
scripts.lint: npm -w @astprep/web run lint && npm -w @astprep/admin run lint
scripts.supabase:gen-types: supabase gen types typescript --local | tee apps/web/src/types/supabase.ts apps/admin/src/types/supabase.ts
